name: Dynamic
description: Dynamic — Web3 authentication SDK supporting wallet-based login, social auth, and embedded wallet creation for dApps.

seo.title: Dynamic — Identity / Auth / User Management
seo.meta_description: Dynamic: Dynamic — Web3 authentication SDK supporting wallet-based login, social auth, and embedded wallet creation for dApps.

when_to_use: Web3 wallet-based login for dApp user authentication
Social login with embedded wallet creation for non-crypto users
Multi-chain wallet connection supporting Ethereum and Solana
OIDC-compatible auth for Web3 apps integrating backend APIs
Gated access control based on on-chain token ownership

pros: Clean Web3 auth SDK with wallet + social + email login
Embedded wallets and multi-chain support out of the box
Good admin dashboard with user analytics
Reasonable pricing tier for early-stage dApps
cons: Newer product; some enterprise features still maturing
Heavier bundle size than minimal wallet connectors
Customization sometimes fights the default UI
review.verdict: Best balance of Web3 UX and developer ergonomics if you want social login plus wallet connect in one SDK.
review.best_for: Consumer dApps wanting embedded wallets plus social onboarding
review.not_for: Institutional custody or apps that need bare-metal wallet control

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock
